# Privacy policy

## GitHub Pages service

This website is hosted as a GitHub Pages website. GitHub may collect personal information from visitors to this GitHub Pages website, including logs of visitor IP addresses, to comply with legal obligations, and to maintain the security and integrity of this website and the service. See the [GitHub Privacy Statement](https://help.github.com/en/github/site-policy/github-privacy-statement) for details.

## Data collection

### Website analytics

No analytics or tracking mechanisms are employed on this website.

## Cookie usage

This website does **not** use cookies.

## Linked services

This website contains links to other websites and services, which are all marked by
the symbol
<img
src="data:image/png;base64,">. If
you follow these links, you should make yourself familiar with their terms of services and privacy policies.
